highlights.text: I wrote in my Monday 4pm newsletter: “Bear case tomorrow: Begins again on the fail of 5777….
My lean was that we spike to 5800+ which is why I got long at 4pm yesterday as readers know.
I wrote yesterday at 4pm: “If I had to provide a general lean though, it is to defer to the macro trend.
Short squeezes are caused by my core setup: The Failed Breakdown when ES flushes a major support, traps, recovers.

In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into multiple iterations of my core setup (the failed breakdown) that we had the past few days at the 5740 level and this has been one of the better examples of how this setup operates.

post_title: Did Bears Drop The Ball This Week In SPX? Oct 7th Plan
